focus_points.label: Energy levels and sustainability of pace.
focus_points.reason: The manager notes that Carl seems tired all the time. This could indicate burnout, personal stress, or workload imbalance — worth exploring to understand the root cause.

focus_points.label: Impact of recent UX initiatives.
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — performance & feedback for a UX Lead should anchor on the impact of their work. Understanding the leverage of recent initiatives is key.

focus_points.label: Delegation and team empowerment.
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — as a Lead, effective delegation is crucial. It could be worth discussing how Carl is empowering his team and distributing workload.

focus_points.label: Engagement with product and engineering peers.
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard performance & feedback topic for a UX Lead. Engaging effectively with stakeholders is essential for aligning UX with broader goals.

focus_points.label: Feedback loops within the design team.
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — ensuring feedback is both given and received effectively is a key performance area. Discussing how feedback loops are functioning could be beneficial.
